verdict: An incredibly rhythmic and accurate chart that captures the meme track's beat perfectly, though it features a couple of overly technical patterns for a Medium difficulty.

issues.problem: Transitioning from a single tap to a jump on the same panel (U -> JUMP UR, and D -> JUMP DR) within an eighth note (187ms) creates an awkward 'pogo' effect that is too jarring for a Medium chart.
The HOLD D active during tap L (58.702) and tap R (58.890) forces an extremely uncomfortable lateral stretch/slide or a harsh crossover for one foot while the other is anchored.
